amendment.description: To require voters to provide photo identification.

action.text: Cloture motion on amendment SA 4732, to the motion to concur in the House message to accompany S. 1383 with amendment SA 4420, presented in Senate.
Amendment SA 4732 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Husted to Amendment SA 4420. To require voters to provide photo identification.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4732 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Husted to Amendment SA 4420.
